---
title: "Vizualizations"
output: html_document
---

<p align="center">
# {.tabset .tabset-fade .tabset-pills}
</p>


## Crédits/Loans, Tunisia, 2012-2019

```{r,echo=F,results='asis'}
library(htmltools)
x="<div class='tableauPlaceholder' id='viz1583141773333' style='position: relative'><noscript><a href='https:&#47;&#47;dhafermalouche.net'><img alt=' ' src='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;Cr&#47;CrditsVotsTunisie&#47;Dashboard1&#47;1_rss.png' style='border: none' /></a></noscript><object class='tableauViz'  style='display:none;'><param name='host_url' value='https%3A%2F%2Fpublic.tableau.com%2F' /> <param name='embed_code_version' value='3' /> <param name='site_root' value='' /><param name='name' value='CrditsVotsTunisie&#47;Dashboard1' /><param name='tabs' value='no' /><param name='toolbar' value='yes' /><param name='static_image' value='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;Cr&#47;CrditsVotsTunisie&#47;Dashboard1&#47;1.png' /> <param name='animate_transition' value='yes' /><param name='display_static_image' value='yes' /><param name='display_spinner' value='yes' /><param name='display_overlay' value='yes' /><param name='display_count' value='yes' /><param name='filter' value='publish=yes' /></object></div>                <script type='text/javascript'>                    var divElement = document.getElementById('viz1583141773333');                    var vizElement = divElement.getElementsByTagName('object')[0];                    if ( divElement.offsetWidth > 800 ) { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.maxWidth='1350px';vizElement.style.height=(divElement.offsetWidth*0.75)+'px';vizElement.style.maxHeight='1587px';} else if ( divElement.offsetWidth > 500 ) { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.maxWidth='1350px';vizElement.style.height=(divElement.offsetWidth*0.75)+'px';vizElement.style.maxHeight='1587px';} else { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.height='1477px';}                     var scriptElement = document.createElement('script');                    scriptElement.src = 'https://public.tableau.com/javascripts/api/viz_v1.js';                    vizElement.parentNode.insertBefore(scriptElement, vizElement);                </script>"
HTML(x)
```

## Municipal Election, Tunisia 2018


```{r,echo=F,results='asis'}
library(htmltools)
x="<div class='tableauPlaceholder' id='viz1583091339416' style='position: relative'><noscript><a href='https:&#47;&#47;dhafermalouche.net'><img alt=' ' src='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;Mu&#47;MunicipalElectionsTunisia2018&#47;Dashboard1&#47;1_rss.png' style='border: none' /></a></noscript><object class='tableauViz'  style='display:none;'><param name='host_url' value='https%3A%2F%2Fpublic.tableau.com%2F' /> <param name='embed_code_version' value='3' /> <param name='site_root' value='' /><param name='name' value='MunicipalElectionsTunisia2018&#47;Dashboard1' /><param name='tabs' value='no' /><param name='toolbar' value='yes' /><param name='static_image' value='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;Mu&#47;MunicipalElectionsTunisia2018&#47;Dashboard1&#47;1.png' /> <param name='animate_transition' value='yes' /><param name='display_static_image' value='yes' /><param name='display_spinner' value='yes' /><param name='display_overlay' value='yes' /><param name='display_count' value='yes' /></object></div>                <script type='text/javascript'>                    var divElement = document.getElementById('viz1583091339416');                    var vizElement = divElement.getElementsByTagName('object')[0];                    if ( divElement.offsetWidth > 800 ) { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.maxWidth='1050px';vizElement.style.height=(divElement.offsetWidth*0.75)+'px';vizElement.style.maxHeight='1087px';} else if ( divElement.offsetWidth > 500 ) { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.maxWidth='1050px';vizElement.style.height=(divElement.offsetWidth*0.75)+'px';vizElement.style.maxHeight='1087px';} else { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.height='1077px';}                     var scriptElement = document.createElement('script');                    scriptElement.src = 'https://public.tableau.com/javascripts/api/viz_v1.js';                    vizElement.parentNode.insertBefore(scriptElement, vizElement);                </script>"
HTML(x)
```


## Democracy in Africa


```{r,echo=F,results='asis'}
library(htmltools)
x="<div class='tableauPlaceholder' id='viz1582711542754' style='position: relative'><noscript><a href='#'><img alt='Dashboard 1 ' src='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;De&#47;DemocracyAfroBarometer&#47;Dashboard1&#47;1_rss.png' style='border: none' /></a></noscript><object class='tableauViz'  style='display:none;'><param name='host_url' value='https%3A%2F%2Fpublic.tableau.com%2F' /> <param name='embed_code_version' value='3' /> <param name='site_root' value='' /><param name='name' value='DemocracyAfroBarometer&#47;Dashboard1' /><param name='tabs' value='no' /><param name='toolbar' value='yes' /><param name='static_image' value='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;De&#47;DemocracyAfroBarometer&#47;Dashboard1&#47;1.png' /> <param name='animate_transition' value='yes' /><param name='display_static_image' value='yes' /><param name='display_spinner' value='yes' /><param name='display_overlay' value='yes' /><param name='display_count' value='yes' /></object></div>                <script type='text/javascript'>                    var divElement = document.getElementById('viz1582711542754');                    var vizElement = divElement.getElementsByTagName('object')[0];                    if ( divElement.offsetWidth > 800 ) { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.maxWidth='950px';vizElement.style.height=(divElement.offsetWidth*0.75)+'px';vizElement.style.maxHeight='887px';} else if ( divElement.offsetWidth > 500 ) { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.maxWidth='950px';vizElement.style.height=(divElement.offsetWidth*0.75)+'px';vizElement.style.maxHeight='887px';} else { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.height='727px';}                     var scriptElement = document.createElement('script');                    scriptElement.src = 'https://public.tableau.com/javascripts/api/viz_v1.js';                    vizElement.parentNode.insertBefore(scriptElement, vizElement);                </script>"
HTML(x)
```


---


## Unemploymemt rate


```{r,echo=F,results='asis'}
library(htmltools)
x="<div class='tableauPlaceholder' id='viz1574610323075' style='position: relative'><noscript><a href='#'><img alt=' ' src='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;Un&#47;UnemploymentRateTunisia2014&#47;Dashboard1&#47;1_rss.png' style='border: none' /></a></noscript><object class='tableauViz'  style='display:none;'><param name='host_url' value='https%3A%2F%2Fpublic.tableau.com%2F' /> <param name='embed_code_version' value='3' /> <param name='site_root' value='' /><param name='name' value='UnemploymentRateTunisia2014&#47;Dashboard1' /><param name='tabs' value='no' /><param name='toolbar' value='yes' /><param name='static_image' value='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;Un&#47;UnemploymentRateTunisia2014&#47;Dashboard1&#47;1.png' /> <param name='animate_transition' value='yes' /><param name='display_static_image' value='yes' /><param name='display_spinner' value='yes' /><param name='display_overlay' value='yes' /><param name='display_count' value='yes' /></object></div>                <script type='text/javascript'>                    var divElement = document.getElementById('viz1574610323075');                    var vizElement = divElement.getElementsByTagName('object')[0];                    vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.height=(divElement.offsetWidth*0.75)+'px';                    var scriptElement = document.createElement('script');                    scriptElement.src = 'https://public.tableau.com/javascripts/api/viz_v1.js';                    vizElement.parentNode.insertBefore(scriptElement, vizElement);                </script>"
HTML(x)
```


## Projection of the Tunisian population



```{r,echo=F,results='asis'}
library(htmltools)
x="<div class='tableauPlaceholder' id='viz1582815207077' style='position: relative'><noscript><a href='https:&#47;&#47;dhafermalouche.net'><img alt=' ' src='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;57&#47;575TFD2HW&#47;1_rss.png' style='border: none' /></a></noscript><object class='tableauViz'  style='display:none;'><param name='host_url' value='https%3A%2F%2Fpublic.tableau.com%2F' /> <param name='embed_code_version' value='3' /> <param name='path' value='shared&#47;575TFD2HW' /> <param name='toolbar' value='yes' /><param name='static_image' value='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;57&#47;575TFD2HW&#47;1.png' /> <param name='animate_transition' value='yes' /><param name='display_static_image' value='yes' /><param name='display_spinner' value='yes' /><param name='display_overlay' value='yes' /><param name='display_count' value='yes' /><param name='filter' value='publish=yes' /></object></div>                <script type='text/javascript'>                    var divElement = document.getElementById('viz1582815207077');                    var vizElement = divElement.getElementsByTagName('object')[0];                    if ( divElement.offsetWidth > 800 ) { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.maxWidth='1050px';vizElement.style.height=(divElement.offsetWidth*0.75)+'px';vizElement.style.maxHeight='987px';} else if ( divElement.offsetWidth > 500 ) { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.maxWidth='1050px';vizElement.style.height=(divElement.offsetWidth*0.75)+'px';vizElement.style.maxHeight='987px';} else { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.height='1277px';}                     var scriptElement = document.createElement('script');                    scriptElement.src = 'https://public.tableau.com/javascripts/api/viz_v1.js';                    vizElement.parentNode.insertBefore(scriptElement, vizElement);                </script>"
HTML(x)
```


## Mortality records in Tunisia


```{r,echo=F,results='asis'}
library(htmltools)
x="<div class='tableauPlaceholder' id='viz1582815353685' style='position: relative'><noscript><a href='#'><img alt=' ' src='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;mo&#47;mortalityrecords2004-2011&#47;Dashboard1&#47;1_rss.png' style='border: none' /></a></noscript><object class='tableauViz'  style='display:none;'><param name='host_url' value='https%3A%2F%2Fpublic.tableau.com%2F' /> <param name='embed_code_version' value='3' /> <param name='site_root' value='' /><param name='name' value='mortalityrecords2004-2011&#47;Dashboard1' /><param name='tabs' value='no' /><param name='toolbar' value='yes' /><param name='static_image' value='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;mo&#47;mortalityrecords2004-2011&#47;Dashboard1&#47;1.png' /> <param name='animate_transition' value='yes' /><param name='display_static_image' value='yes' /><param name='display_spinner' value='yes' /><param name='display_overlay' value='yes' /><param name='display_count' value='yes' /></object></div>                <script type='text/javascript'>                    var divElement = document.getElementById('viz1582815353685');                    var vizElement = divElement.getElementsByTagName('object')[0];                    if ( divElement.offsetWidth > 800 ) { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.maxWidth='950px';vizElement.style.height=(divElement.offsetWidth*0.75)+'px';vizElement.style.maxHeight='887px';} else if ( divElement.offsetWidth > 500 ) { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.maxWidth='950px';vizElement.style.height=(divElement.offsetWidth*0.75)+'px';vizElement.style.maxHeight='887px';} else { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.height='727px';}                     var scriptElement = document.createElement('script');                    scriptElement.src = 'https://public.tableau.com/javascripts/api/viz_v1.js';                    vizElement.parentNode.insertBefore(scriptElement, vizElement);                </script>"
HTML(x)
```


## US Baby names



```{r,echo=F,results='asis'}
library(htmltools)
x="<div class='tableauPlaceholder' id='viz1582815466158' style='position: relative'><noscript><a href='#'><img alt=' ' src='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;Ba&#47;BabynamesintheUS&#47;babynames&#47;1_rss.png' style='border: none' /></a></noscript><object class='tableauViz'  style='display:none;'><param name='host_url' value='https%3A%2F%2Fpublic.tableau.com%2F' /> <param name='embed_code_version' value='3' /> <param name='site_root' value='' /><param name='name' value='BabynamesintheUS&#47;babynames' /><param name='tabs' value='no' /><param name='toolbar' value='yes' /><param name='static_image' value='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;Ba&#47;BabynamesintheUS&#47;babynames&#47;1.png' /> <param name='animate_transition' value='yes' /><param name='display_static_image' value='yes' /><param name='display_spinner' value='yes' /><param name='display_overlay' value='yes' /><param name='display_count' value='yes' /></object></div>                <script type='text/javascript'>                    var divElement = document.getElementById('viz1582815466158');                    var vizElement = divElement.getElementsByTagName('object')[0];                    if ( divElement.offsetWidth > 800 ) { vizElement.style.minWidth='720px';vizElement.style.maxWidth='1020px';vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.minHeight='587px';vizElement.style.maxHeight='887px';vizElement.style.height=(divElement.offsetWidth*0.75)+'px';} else if ( divElement.offsetWidth > 500 ) { vizElement.style.minWidth='720px';vizElement.style.maxWidth='1020px';vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.minHeight='587px';vizElement.style.maxHeight='887px';vizElement.style.height=(divElement.offsetWidth*0.75)+'px';} else { vizElement.style.width='100%';vizElement.style.height='1227px';}                     var scriptElement = document.createElement('script');                    scriptElement.src = 'https://public.tableau.com/javascripts/api/viz_v1.js';                    vizElement.parentNode.insertBefore(scriptElement, vizElement);                </script>"
HTML(x)
```


## Regional Switzerland GDP


```{r,echo=F,results='asis'}
library(htmltools)
x="<div class='tableauPlaceholder' id='viz1582815572274' style='position: relative'><noscript><a href='https:&#47;&#47;malouche.github.io&#47;'><img alt=' ' src='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;Sw&#47;SwitzerlandGDPfrom1991to2017byCantons&#47;Dashboard1&#47;1_rss.png' style='border: none' /></a></noscript><object class='tableauViz'  style='display:none;'><param name='host_url' value='https%3A%2F%2Fpublic.tableau.com%2F' /> <param name='embed_code_version' value='3' /> <param name='path' value='views&#47;SwitzerlandGDPfrom1991to2017byCantons&#47;Dashboard1?:embed=y&amp;:display_count=y' /> <param name='toolbar' value='yes' /><param name='static_image' value='https:&#47;&#47;public.tableau.com&#47;static&#47;images&#47;Sw&#47;SwitzerlandGDPfrom1991to2017byCantons&#47;Dashboard1&#47;1.png' /> <param name='animate_transition' value='yes' /><param name='display_static_image' value='yes' /><param name='display_spinner' value='yes' /><param name='display_overlay' value='yes' /><param name='display_count' value='yes' /></object></div>                <script type='text/javascript'>                    var divElement = document.getElementById('viz1582815572274');                    var vizElement = divElement.getElementsByTagName('object')[0];                    vizElement.style.width='1366px';vizElement.style.height='795px';                    var scriptElement = document.createElement('script');                    scriptElement.src = 'https://public.tableau.com/javascripts/api/viz_v1.js';                    vizElement.parentNode.insertBefore(scriptElement, vizElement);                </script>"
HTML(x)
```
